title: SOP Training Site Template
description: Professional training site with document libraries, service records tracking, and completion registry. Deployed by the SharePoint Training Site Deployer automation system.

instructions: 1. First, register the site_script.json using Add-PnPSiteScript
3. Replace SITE_SCRIPT_ID_PLACEHOLDER above with the actual Script ID
4. Register this site design using Add-PnPSiteDesign
5. The template will appear in 'From your organization' when creating new sites

powershell.registerDesign: Add-PnPSiteDesign -Title 'SOP Training Site Template' -SiteScripts '<SCRIPT_ID>' -WebTemplate CommunicationSite -Description 'Professional training site with compliance tracking'
